title: Work Order Event
description: A work order lifecycle event from Aurora MySQL. Tracks service requests from creation through completion.

work_order_id.description: Unique identifier for the work order.

event_ts.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when this event occurred.

status.description: Current lifecycle status of the work order.

cycle_time_minutes.description: Elapsed minutes from creation to completion. Null if still open.

technician_id.description: Staff member assigned to execute the work order.
